title: RHCSA 10 Lab 16: Password Aging
description: Adjust password aging for a local user

tasks: Create user aging10 and set password cinder9.
Set maximum password age to 60 days.
Set password warning period to 7 days.
checks: chage -l aging10 | grep -Eq 'warning.*7|Warning.*7' && getent shadow aging10 | awk -F: '$6 == 7 {ok=1} END {exit !ok}'
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: Create user aging10 and set password cinder9
Set maximum password age to 60 days
Set password warning period to 7 days
